title: Light Festive Slovakian Potatoes Bake
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring fermented potatoes, baked in the oven for a light and festive twist. Perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: Potatoes, peeled and grated
ingredients.notes: use a mix of Russet and sweet potatoes for the best results

ingredients.name: Sour cream, dairy-free alternative
ingredients.notes: such as soy or coconut cream

ingredients.name: Onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: use a sweet onion for added flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: use 2 cloves for a milder flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt for added texture

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley, chopped
ingredients.notes: adds a pop of color and fresh flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, sour cream, onion, garlic, sour rye flour, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until the potatoes are coated in the wet ingredients.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the potatoes for 45 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the potatoes hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
